/.title: Lummen Media
/.description: We help entrepreneurs and businesses create impactful videos to build brand value and increase revenue. We have worked with some of the biggest creators & brands (5M+ FOLLOWERS COMBINED).
h4: Tailored editing aligned with brand identity
Content built for lasting audience retention
p: My team and I help creators and brands boost engagement and revenue through strategy, editing, and design.
Trusted by leading creators and brands (5M+ FOLLOWERS COMBINED).
My team and I help creators and brands boost engagement and revenue through strategy, editing,
and design. Trusted by leading creators and brands (5M+ FOLLOWERS COMBINED).
Through Strategy, Editing, and Design. Trusted by leading creators and brands.
Powered by creativity, strategy, and data, we’ve helped creators and brands generate 50M+ Organic Views.
Lummen Media has worked with creators and brands with 5M+ combined followers, gaining real insight into what works.
From cinematic cuts, color grading, and sound design, to high-quality animations and motion graphics, we use advanced editing techniques to make videos pop.
Quickly turn your videos in to revenue engines.
We don’t just make videos look good, we make them work. Every piece is built on data and trends.
We study what makes people click, watch, and return—building loyal audiences, not random reach.
We’ve worked with creators and brands who already reach millions. That experience give us a clear picture of what works.
Views are meaningless without returns. We turn content into a system for growth and revenue.
We’ve helped creators and brands hit millions of views by focusing on strategy, audience, and results, not fluff.
Professional editing to craft engaging videos for all platforms.
Proven methods to accelerate growth and sustain long-term.
Crack the signals platforms crave. Push content where it matters.
With a focus on innovation and efficiency, we help you stay ahead in an ever-evolving digital landscape.
Every video leaves hidden performance markers. We decode retention, clicks, and content decay to reveal what drives growth.
We construct repeatable frameworks—topic positioning, editing architecture, and thumbnail mechanics - built to trigger reach.
We optimize the system under real audience feedback, cutting waste and amplifying only what drives sustained growth. You’ll feel it once you work with us.
We offer premium services for brands and creators designed to enhance their reach and showcase their best work.
Hear from our clients! See how we’ve helped them achieve their goals and create lasting impact.
"Nihal is an exceptional editor who delivered exactly what I was looking for. The quality of his work is truly outstanding—among the very best I’ve seen."
"We were blown away by the creative approach and attention to detail. The team took our ideas and turned them into really really good videos.”

“Nihal is the perfect combination of creative and responsive - he has great instincts for the visuals, text, branding etc., and also listens when I ask him to go in a different stylistic direction in a few places.”
Ready to take the next step? Join us now and start transforming your vision into reality with expert support.
